title: Herpes Latency Explained
script_summary: Exploring the hidden science of herpes latency and its implications.

segments.voiceover: Here's what science actually says about herpes latency.
After initial infection, the virus hides in your nerves, often undetected.
Stress, illness, or even sunlight can trigger outbreaks from this latent state.
Research shows this latency can last for years, affecting millions worldwide.
Understanding latency could lead to better treatments in the future.
Want to learn more about viruses and immunity? Hit that follow button!
